summary: Frontend-only smoke test for images/audio bug. All images load correctly on all pages (0 broken). All 4 audio players on Voices page fail with MediaError code 4 (MEDIA_ELEMENT_ERROR: Format error/src not supported), even though CDN returns HTTP 206 with valid range support. Bug reproduced 100%.
passed: Homepage: 4/4 images loaded (hero, featured object, 2 collection covers) - naturalWidth > 0 for all
Rajwada detail page: 9/9 gallery images loaded (0 broken)
Lal Bagh detail page: 19/19 gallery images loaded (0 broken)
Voices page: 3/3 voice portraits loaded (Harishchand Mishra, Ankit Verma, Pushyamitra Bhargava)
No CORS errors in console for image loading
Direct fetch() of audio URL from page returns HTTP 206 (Partial Content), Content-Type: audio/x-m4a, Accept-Ranges: bytes - so CDN and CORS are functional for XHR/fetch

failed.issue: All 4 <audio> elements fail to load. readyState=0, networkState indicates failure, duration=NaN, MediaError code=4 (MEDIA_ERR_SRC_NOT_SUPPORTED), 'error' event fires immediately on load(). Network shows net::ERR_ABORTED for all 4 .m4a URLs.
failed.evidence: Playwright evaluate: {errorEvent: true, error: {code: 4, message: ''}, src: '...l83a0mus_Sheetal Nagar 6...m4a'}. Same for all 4 audio files: gou4uab7_Call with ankit..., 5th6emyg_Sheetal Nagar 4..., l83a0mus_Sheetal Nagar 6..., t41yabvo_Sheetal Nagar 6... Meanwhile fetch() of the same URL from within the page returns 206 OK with audio/x-m4a. Suggests either (a) audio element has crossOrigin attribute but CDN response to media element requests lacks Access-Control-Allow-Origin header (audio subresource CORS is separate from fetch), or (b) browser rejects Content-Type 'audio/x-m4a' (Chromium prefers 'audio/mp4' or 'audio/aac' for .m4a containers).

action_items: Fix audio playback on /voices - all 4 audio players are broken with MediaError code 4 while images work fine.

Recommended investigation order: (1) Remove crossOrigin attribute from <audio> tags in VoicesPage.jsx if not needed (audio does not need CORS for simple playback). (2) If crossOrigin is required for the audio API being used, confirm CDN sends Access-Control-Allow-Origin on GET requests to .m4a files with Origin header (test with curl -H 'Origin: https://archival-spaces.preview.emergentagent.com'). (3) Consider re-encoding to .mp3 or serving with Content-Type 'audio/mp4' instead of 'audio/x-m4a'.
Images are working correctly - no action needed on image loading fix.
